title: Melania Trump blasts 'lies' linking her to Epstein: 'I am not his victim'
subhed: Jeffrey Epstein died in federal custody in 2019 while awaiting trial on sex trafficking charges involving minors, but the scandal has repeatedly overshadowed Donald Trump's second presidency. 'I was not a participant. Was never on Epstein's plane, and never visited his private island,' the first lady said.

title: In Budapest, a seven-hour concert aims to hasten Viktor Orban's 'end of the regime'
subhed: Robert Puzser, an intellectual and outspoken critic of the Fidesz party led by Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban, is organizing this historic free show on Friday, April 10, to urge citizens to turn out for Sunday's legislative elections.

title: AI is reshaping translators' work: 'Translation isn't simply converting words from one language to another'
